prediction.reasoning: This prediction is based on a generalized financial model (Geometric Brownian Motion) that assumes an annualized average drift of 6% and an annualized volatility of 20% for SBUX over the next 20 trading days (approximately 0.079 years). The point estimate represents the expected mean price, while the confidence intervals reflect the range within which the price is predicted to fall with the specified probabilities, based on the assumed volatility. Please note that actual market conditions, company-specific news, and broader economic factors can cause the price to deviate significantly from this prediction. This is not financial advice.
